title: Mis and Disinformation in Global Health Symposium - Media Ecosystems Analysis Group
snippet: This page summarizes Fabio Giglietto's presentation at the Mis and Disinformation in Global Health Symposium, where he discussed research on coordinated link sharing behavior in Nigeria and India. He presented the CooRnet package for detecting and analyzing this behavior.
description: This page summarizes Fabio Giglietto's presentation at the Mis and Disinformation in Global Health Symposium, discussing his research on coordinated link sharing behavior and the CooRnet package. This is a third-party mention of his work relating to coordinated online behavior.

snippet: Information about the Digital Social Network Analysis course lectured by Fabio Giglietto at the University of Urbino, including learning objectives, program, and skills acquired.
description: This Uniurb webpage describes the 'Digital Social Network Analysis' course taught by Fabio Giglietto for the academic year 2025/2026, outlining its learning objectives, program, and skills acquired. NEWS - Urbino - Mapping Italian News Research Program - Uniurb
snippet: This page mentions Fabio Giglietto as the Internet Studies professor and chair of vera.ai WP4. It also mentions a white paper co-authored by Fabio Giglietto and Massimo Terenzi from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, that explores how the Digital Services Act (DSA) is transforming data access for platform research.
description: The Uniurb news page mentions Fabio Giglietto as the Internet Studies professor and chair of vera.ai WP4 and references his co-authored white paper on the DSA's impact on platform research, indicating recent academic activity.
